built_recently: Big upgrade to how we pick the Market of the Day. It now cross-references every market against what is actually trending in the news using Wikipedia top stories from the day before. Markets that are moving AND matching what people are reading about rise to the top. We also decoupled the daily trade pick from the editorial hero, so the paper portfolio now only takes positions on markets resolving within 14 days.
coming_next: Building The Spread: a feature that flags where Polymarket and Kalshi price the same event differently. When two crowds disagree by 8 or more points, one of them is wrong. We will show you which one and by how much.
